title: We would like to hire an expert!
excerpt: After an expert to help us streamline our current monday.com workflow. Especially to help with scheduling in work!

posts.author: oceancgi (Peter Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: After an expert to help us streamline our current monday.com workflow. Especially to help with scheduling in work!

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community @oceancgi!

You are in the right place to find a Monday.com expert.

I, myself, offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current set up, and I can show you options going forward. You can book a session through this link.

I’ve specialised in Monday.com for three years now and love the software! I also have a background in management and projects, allowing me to streamline my clients’ processes with ease! On my team, I also have another Monday specialist, project manager and a developer/Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @oceancgi !

Glad to see that you reached out. You are in the right place. There are plenty of skilled partners.

Omnitas Consulting are platinum monday.com partners. We are located in Stockholm, Sweden and operate world wide. We are responsible for some of the most complex monday.com implementations out there. Thanks to this we have been awarded Best professional service partner by monday.com both 2019 and 2020.

Please check out our webinar with one of our US clients where we talk about the perks of working with a partner.

We would like to start with an initial exploratory call to talk about your challenges and your needs to make sure we can actually help you out! Feel free to email me at thomas@omnitas.se.

Good luck!

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Peter,
If incase you are still looking out for some help, feel free to reach out to me as this is well within my area of expertise.

Best Wishes and Have a great day ahead,
Andrew

posts.author: timlittletech (Tim Little)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI @oceancgi

Welcome to the monday community! There are plenty of great folks who can help you out here. I would love to sit down with you and talk through the details of your needs and get you up and running on your monday journey!
I have helped many clients set up across different industries, for scheduling, workflow management, project management, client success tracking and other use-cases. I also can help integrate monday with any other systems/software that your team uses as well.

If you are still looking please go ahead and schedule a call with me here: Calendly - Tim Little Looking forward to chatting.

Best!
